title: Manifest lock and generated file ownership
objective: Make manifest.lock a real generated-file ownership and upgrade contract instead of a simple checksum list.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Manifest records generator version, source build-handoff hash, answers, managed files, ownership, mergeStrategy, and conflictPolicy.
Generated AGENTS.md and GitHub workflows are marked shared, infra/caddy is propose-only, secrets are excluded.
Add a check command or internal function that can detect changed managed files.

koObjective: 생성 파일의 ownership, checksum, merge strategy를 추적하는 manifest 체계를 만든다.

koGuide.요약: 이 작업은 Codex가 Dev Container 안에서 자동 구현할 수 있도록 설계된 단계별 task packet입니다.
